title: Assistant Store Manager - Borosil - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Borosil - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
We at Borosil are looking for an experienced Assistant Store Manager based out of Indore. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Borosil:
Borosil is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Borosil!
